title: Kuruna scandens
taxonomy: Kuruna scandens is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of the Americas. Kuruna scandens is a climber or a shrub that grows up to 3 meters in height. The plant is also known as Kuruna, and it belongs to the genus Kuruna in the family Rubiaceae. Further classification may involve identification of the specific genus and species within the Rubiaceae family.
